title: Kaworu insert fangirl squee
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Fri Jul 12, 2013 5:20 pm Kendrix wrote: Meh. He still got a mouth. And those wondrous long pianist fingers...

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jul 12, 2013 5:35 pm Katana wrote: One doesn't simply want to steal my husbando.

[]:             Quote Post by Sgt. Griff » Fri Jul 12, 2013 5:48 pm Kendrix wrote: Meh. He still got a mouth. And those wondrous long pianist fingers...

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jul 12, 2013 6:18 pm Sgt. Griff wrote: Sorry to break it to you, but a lot of pianists have quite thick stubby fingers.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Fri Jul 12, 2013 6:30 pm Ahem... hate to break it up but aren't we getting off-topic here? And in pretty much the same way the previous discussion about the merits of shaving in certain spots too. You might want to cut it out before NemZ whips out the Delete Post button again. (Mods are free to delete this along with the above discussion if that gets deleted.)

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Fri Jul 12, 2013 7:34 pm Dream wrote: No fun allowed. Boo :(

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Fri Jul 12, 2013 7:42 pm "No fun allowed. Boo" might not have been entirely serious. Personal Grooming split seemed to be more for humor than anything else anyways.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jul 12, 2013 8:51 pm I am occasionally a merciful god. Have your fun, but tempt not my vengeance in the pic thread again. ...and why do you assume it's always me? The other mods didn't just disappear, you know.

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Sat Jul 13, 2013 4:17 am NemZ wrote: I am occasionally a merciful god. Have your fun, but tempt not my vengeance in the pic thread again.

[]:             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Sat Jul 13, 2013 10:31 am Katana wrote: Jesus Christ, you're god damn awesome! On-Topic, if this thread is about Kaworu, I highly dislike obese yaoi fangirls who tend to put him with Shinji simply because he said he loves him.

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Sat Jul 13, 2013 10:43 am Jurrasic wrote: Unfortunately that description covers 90% of EVA fanfic writers (and 98% of DevianTART "artists")

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sat Jul 13, 2013 11:35 am Katana wrote: I wish Kaworu never said that. Stupid overweight yaoi pigs.

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Sat Jul 13, 2013 11:42 am That's because loving someone doesn't mean SEX EVERYTIME I want 2 fk u so bad and whatnot. He meant love as "friendship" and not as what those stupid yaoi bishes think, which is what pisses me off and ruins the character. I could even say "I love you" to my best female friend, but that doesn't mean that I'm a lesbian or want to have sex with her.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Jul 13, 2013 12:48 pm Katana wrote: That's because loving someone doesn't mean SEX EVERYTIME I want 2 fk u so bad and whatnot.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Jul 13, 2013 12:53 pm Favorite moment? Watching his head go boom! in 3.33. Glorious.

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Sat Jul 13, 2013 3:54 pm The most memorable moment is Ode to Joy. And LAK is the most underrated yet good pairing. They're afraid of losing yaoi pigs, this is why they never care about them. Also Rei IS a puppet, because she'd even suck Gendo's dick if she would be ordered to.

[]:             Quote Post by moonwolf2024 » Sat Jul 13, 2013 4:02 pm I would appreciate it if you stop calling people who like yaoi pigs and obese. It's in really bad taste.

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Sat Jul 13, 2013 4:06 pm But it's the truth!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Jul 13, 2013 4:07 pm Hopefully it isn't out of my place to call you on your discriminatory behavior towards those that enjoy a form of entertainment that you seem to dislike. I kindly request that you cease insulting those that enjoy yaoi.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jul 13, 2013 4:09 pm This thread needs to take a sharp turn back to talking about Kaworu and less about bashing hypothetical fans unless you want it locked. Kendrix had the right idea.
